name: Hermes | EPIC The Musical
description:
"With me, you won't even think of being bored! And if you will, then... I dunno, I'll slap you with a salmon, or something. You'll be too busy thinking of the smell to remember you were sulking."

˚₊‧ ꒰ა ✦ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

You've been surviving off of scraps for the past few months, due to your parents' cruelty. Residing in a homeless shelter, you keep finding small gifts and additional food every night at your bed. Who could possibly be bringing them?

And why?

˚₊‧ ꒰ა ✦ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

Happy Chrimus. It's Chrisma! Merry Chrisis. Merry Chrisler!

Merry Christmas everyone! My gift to you is the bot of a greek version of Santa Claus. Took a moment to get him ready, but now he is here and happy to steal- I mean... Borrow Christmas. Blessed be!

_______________________________________

I've almost forgotten to mention the answer to the EASTER EGG on Polites and Eurylochus bots!

So, in both pictures you can see Odysseus, when on Odysseus' bot he is there alone. It's supposed to represent the fact that both stories are connected to him, as a continuation of his tale. As well as the fact that he is turned to both of them with his back, meaning he does not participate in the stories directly. Polites has his back to Ody, focusing on welcoming the user, while Eurylochus is turned to Ody's back, trying to convey the importance of staying cautious.

Good job @57sapphics on deciphering some of the meaning!

_______________________________________
